Findings.Issue: Concurrency bottlenecks detected in the order queue mutex locks during high-throughput stress tests.
Memory fragmentation observed in the order book snapshot garbage collection cycle.

Recommendations.Action: Implement lock-free data structures (e.g., disruptor pattern) for the core matching queue.
Pre-allocate memory pools for order objects to minimize GC pauses.

Findings.Issue: Outdated cryptographic ciphers used in FIX session TLS handshake.

Recommendations.Action: Force TLS 1.3 across all client and exchange-facing execution nodes.

Findings.Issue: Hardcoded fat-finger limits for OTC instruments.

Recommendations.Action: Migrate risk thresholds to a dynamic configuration database.

Gaps.Gap: Does not reflect the recent migration from Redis to Aerospike for the market data caching layer.
Missing network topology diagrams for the cross-connects in the new colocation facility.

UpdatesRequired.Task: Revise data flow diagrams to include Aerospike clusters.
Append BGP routing schemas for colocation centers.

Gaps.Gap: Missing updated audit logging procedures required for SEC Rule 613 (Consolidated Audit Trail).

UpdatesRequired.Task: Draft and append CAT reporting technical specifications.

Phase.name: Remediation and Integration
Phase.Objective: Address all critical code findings and finalize documentation.

Tasks.Task: Publish updated System Architecture Design v2.0.

Phase.name: Staging and UAT (User Acceptance Testing)
Phase.Objective: Validate the remediated system under simulated market conditions.

Tasks.Task: Execute high-frequency trading (HFT) latency stress tests.
Validate dynamic pre-trade risk controls and circuit breakers.
Conduct mock trading sessions with beta clients.

Phase.name: Production Activation
Phase.Objective: Live deployment and activation of the trading application.

Tasks.Task: Deploy NextGen binaries to colocation servers (Dark Launch).
Cutover market data feeds to new processing pipeline.

ActivationMilestone.RollbackPlan: Keep legacy system in read-only standby mode for 72 hours post-activation.
